basic_details.job_title: NHM SHSRC Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Health Mission State Health Systems Resource Centres (NHM SHSRC)
basic_details.short_information: National Health Mission State Health Systems Resource Centres (NHM SHSRC) Advisor - Health Systems Strengthening Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nhm.tn.gov.in. A total of 1 Advisor - Health Systems Strengthening vacancy has been announced through the NHM SHSRC Advisor - Health Systems Strengthening Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Medical Graduate from a recognised institution, Postgraduate qualification in Public Health / Community Medicine / Preventive & Social Medicine / Health Management / Public Policy or equivalent from a recognised university or institution, Minimum 10 years of professional experience in public health, health systems strengthening, programme management or policy advisory roles
qualification.details: Medical Graduate from a recognised institution. Postgraduate qualification in Public Health / Community Medicine / Preventive & Social Medicine / Health Management / Public Policy or equivalent from a recognised university or institution. Minimum 10 years of professional experience in public health, health systems strengthening, programme management or policy advisory roles.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHM SHSRC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NHM SHSRC Advisor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NHM SHSRC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NHM SHSRC Advisor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NHM SHSRC Advisor Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Medical Graduate from a recognised institution. Postgraduate qualification in Public Health / Community Medicine / Preventive & Social Medicine / Health Management / Public Policy or equivalent from a recognised university or institution. Minimum 10 years of professional experience in public health, health systems strengthening, programme management or policy advisory roles.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHM SHSRC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NHM SHSRC Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NHM SHSRC Advisor – Health Systems Strengthening recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the NHM SHSRC Advisor – Health Systems Strengthening position is 23rd July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Advisor – Health Systems Strengthening post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Advisor – Health Systems Strengthening in the National Health Mission State Health Systems Resource Centres (NHM SHSRC) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: To be eligible, candidates must be a Medical Graduate with a postgraduate qualification in Public Health or related fields, and possess a minimum of 10 years of professional experience in health systems strengthening or programme management.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Advisor – Health Systems Strengthening position is 50 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Based on the provided information, there is no application fee mentioned for this recruitment. Candidates should verify this detail in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for the NHM SHSRC Advisor – Health Systems Strengthening recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to fill out and submit their applications through the official website.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Advisor – Health Systems Strengthening is offered on a contractual basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed term as per the terms and conditions of the NHM SHSRC.

faq.question: Q8. Which state is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment drive is specifically for candidates residing in or willing to work in Tamil Nadu. The posts are located in Chennai.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Advisor – Health Systems Strengthening role?
faq.answer: The selection process details are not explicitly provided in the extracted data. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for comprehensive information on the selection methodology.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to download and read the notification thoroughly before applying.
